title: Weekly Vessel Valuations Report, October 26 2021
summary:
Main
in Weekly Vessel Valuations Report 26/10/2021
Image reference: 2021-10-26_weekly-vessel-valuations-report-october-26-2021_img1.png
Tanker: Tanker values have firmed. VLCC Gilos (319,200 DWT, Oct 2004, Hyundai Samho Heavy Ind) sold to Egyptian buyers for USD 31.00 mil, VV value USD 29.50 mil. Bulker: Handy Bulkers values have softened
Panamax Bei Lun Hai 9 (69,700 DWT, Feb 1989, Imabari) sold to Chinese buyers for USD 4.70 mil, VV value USD 5.87 mil - At Auction.
